title: oeonia culicifera
intro: Oeonia culicifera, also known as Oenothera, is a flowering plant species in the evening primrose family. The medicinal properties of Oenothera are primarily due to its high concentration of fatty acids, particularly gamma-linolenic acid (GLA) and linoleic acid, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera include relief from menopausal symptoms, skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and menstrual cramps, as well as improvement in heart health and immune function. Oenothera is commonly used in herbal preparations, including capsules, oils, and tinctures, which are often used to support women's health and alleviate symptoms associated with premenstrual syndrome (PMS).
